title: ANA Airlines and Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: ANA Airlines and Evangelion             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue May 01, 2012 9:23 pm There must be some partnership/ad campaign between these two: http://www.ana-evangelion.com/ The site's blank right now but they say it'll be updated sometime in late May. There's some wallpapers on the site now that actually look pretty cool. So we may see Eva-01 on a plane at some point, like they did with Pikachu

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue May 01, 2012 9:33 pm I wonder if the flight attendants will have to cosplay as Eva characters? I like the moto

[]:             Quote Post by Dekabreak » Tue May 01, 2012 10:51 pm Anyone wanna take another guess at who's Eva's next partnership with?

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Wed May 02, 2012 12:09 am Oh, wow. http://yaraon.blog109.fc2.com/blog-entry-9199.html#more

[]:             Quote Post by MightyWings » Wed May 02, 2012 12:13 am I wonder if they'll fly their "Eva" planes internationally, or if they'll only be used for domestic flights. I was thinking about flying ANA on my next flight to Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed May 02, 2012 12:14 am One day all these Evangelion 3.0 tie ins & merchandise will lead to what we really want to see.... a goddamn release date. Lol

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Wed May 02, 2012 12:23 am Grummancat should be pleased with this development.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Wed May 02, 2012 6:02 pm Dekabreak wrote: Anyone wanna take another guess at who's Eva's next partnership with?

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Wed May 02, 2012 7:33 pm Henry Spencer wrote: Trojan condoms?

[]:             Quote Post by Redaye » Wed May 02, 2012 8:52 pm OMG! Something in a new paint schema for my Flight Simulator!!

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Wed May 02, 2012 9:38 pm sum_exsanguis wrote: could they come in LCL flavoring?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri May 04, 2012 11:57 pm Entry Plug Tampons.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Sat May 05, 2012 12:06 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Entry Plug Tampons.

[]: More info on 3.0?             Quote Post by fearlubu » Mon May 14, 2012 3:21 am came across this page not too long ago. anyone willing to translate it? http://extr.b-ch.com/cgi-bin/eva_news/official/rss_det.cgi?news_c=11197&newsctg_c=1002 in that link, is another link leading to this site. seems like something is popping off on the 21st of this month. http://www.ana-evangelion.com/

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon May 14, 2012 3:41 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 14, 2012 6:30 am The ANA x Evangelion site's been updated. You can buy clear files and some kind of lottery? There's also an augmented reality app you can download starting in June.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu May 31, 2012 12:16 pm More wallpapers on their site: http://www.ana-evangelion.com/wallpaper2.html

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu May 31, 2012 12:33 pm Wonder if 3.0 will have some ANA advertising in it? Seems they are operating the new 787 (please paint them in EVA colors) if only I had time and money

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Thu May 31, 2012 9:15 pm Ornette wrote: More wallpapers on their site: http://www.ana-evangelion.com/wallpaper2.html

There's some wallpapers on the site now that actually look pretty cool. So we may see Eva-01 on a plane at some point, like they did with Pikachu
